proposed_hypotheses.text: Each one-unit increase in `feature_041` is associated with higher `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: In univariate OLS, each one-unit increase in feature_041 was associated with 0.1765 months higher pfs_months (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ordinal `feature_025` values are associated with lower `pfs_months`, with patients at `feature_025` equal to 2 having the shortest `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Treating feature_025 as ordinal 0/1/2, each one-level increase was associated with -1.1897 months lower pfs_months (p=<1e-300).
Patients with feature_025=2 had -1.6491 months different mean pfs_months than all other patients (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_036` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_036` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 3.7027 for feature_036=1 versus 5.0547 for feature_036=0; the mean difference was -1.3520 months (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_015` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_015` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 4.1142 for feature_015=1 versus 4.4194 for feature_015=0; the mean difference was -0.3052 months (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_001` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_001` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 4.1214 for feature_001=1 versus 4.4482 for feature_001=0; the mean difference was -0.3268 months (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_029` values are associated with lower `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: In univariate OLS, each one-unit increase in feature_029 was associated with -0.0053 months lower pfs_months (p=<1e-300).
Top-quartile feature_029 values (>=10.0700) had -0.3578 months different mean pfs_months than bottom-quartile values (<=1.9600; p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_050` values are associated with higher `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: In univariate OLS, each one-unit increase in feature_050 was associated with 0.4654 months higher pfs_months (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_056` values are associated with lower `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: In univariate OLS, each one-unit increase in feature_056 was associated with -0.0730 months lower pfs_months (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_043` equal to 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_043` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 5.0889 for feature_043=1 versus 4.1168 for feature_043=0; the mean difference was 0.9722 months (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_066` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_066` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 4.0941 for feature_066=1 versus 4.3220 for feature_066=0; the mean difference was -0.2279 months (p=3.240e-7).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_042` equal to 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_042` equal to 0, but this association weakens after adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted mean pfs_months was 4.5261 for feature_042=1 versus 4.3050 for feature_042=0; the mean difference was 0.2211 months (p=7.139e-4).
After adjustment for the 12 strongest univariate predictors, feature_042 had coefficient 0.0210 months (p=0.3588), so the independent association was not supported.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_039` values are associated with lower `pfs_months`, but the association is not independent after adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted OLS estimated -5.949e-4 months per one-unit increase in feature_039 (p=0.0041).
After adjustment for the 12 strongest univariate predictors, feature_039 had coefficient 2.213e-5 months (p=0.7769), refuting an independent effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The core predictors `feature_041`, `feature_025`, `feature_036`, `feature_015`, `feature_001`, `feature_029`, `feature_050`, `feature_056`, `feature_043`, and `feature_066` retain their directions after mutual adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: In the adjusted OLS model, feature_041 had coefficient 0.1758 months (p=<1e-300).
In the adjusted OLS model, feature_025 had coefficient -1.1715 months (p=<1e-300).
In the adjusted OLS model, feature_036 had coefficient -1.3613 months (p=<1e-300).
In the adjusted OLS model, feature_015 had coefficient -0.2869 months (p=<1e-300).
In the adjusted OLS model, feature_001 had coefficient -0.3533 months (p=<1e-300).
In the adjusted OLS model, feature_029 had coefficient -0.0050 months (p=<1e-300).
In the adjusted OLS model, feature_050 had coefficient 0.4695 months (p=<1e-300).
In the adjusted OLS model, feature_056 had coefficient -0.0761 months (p=<1e-300).
In the adjusted OLS model, feature_043 had coefficient 0.9428 months (p=<1e-300).
In the adjusted OLS model, feature_066 had coefficient -0.3555 months (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive slope between `feature_041` and `pfs_months` is weaker at higher `feature_025` levels.

analyses.result_summary: In OLS with feature_041, feature_025, and their product, the feature_041:feature_025 interaction was -0.0072 months per feature_041 unit per feature_025 level (p=<1e-300).
Within feature_025=0, the feature_041 slope was 0.1800 months per unit (p=<1e-300).
Within feature_025=1, the feature_041 slope was 0.1774 months per unit (p=<1e-300).
Within feature_025=2, the feature_041 slope was 0.1631 months per unit (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive slope between `feature_041` and `pfs_months` is weaker when `feature_036` equals 1 than when `feature_036` equals 0.

analyses.result_summary: The feature_041:feature_036 interaction coefficient was -0.0071 months per feature_041 unit (p=1.889e-9).
Within feature_036=0, the feature_041 slope was 0.1804 months per unit (p=<1e-300).
Within feature_036=1, the feature_041 slope was 0.1733 months per unit (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The combined adverse association of `feature_015` and `feature_001` with `pfs_months` is less negative than expected from adding their separate effects.

analyses.result_summary: The feature_015:feature_001 interaction coefficient was 0.4517 months (p=<1e-300), offsetting part of the separate adverse main effects.
Within feature_001=0, feature_015=1 versus 0 changed mean pfs_months by -0.4935 months (p=<1e-300).
Within feature_001=1, feature_015=1 versus 0 changed mean pfs_months by -0.0418 months (p=0.1664).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The favorable association of `feature_043` with `pfs_months` is smaller among patients with `feature_015` equal to 1 than among patients with `feature_015` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: The feature_015:feature_043 interaction coefficient was -1.4541 months (p=<1e-300).
Within feature_015=0, feature_043=1 versus 0 changed mean pfs_months by 1.4796 months (p=<1e-300).
Within feature_015=1, feature_043=1 versus 0 changed mean pfs_months by 0.0255 months (p=0.5158).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The favorable association of `feature_043` with `pfs_months` is smaller among patients with `feature_001` equal to 1 than among patients with `feature_001` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: The feature_001:feature_043 interaction coefficient was -1.6288 months (p=<1e-300).
Within feature_001=0, feature_043=1 versus 0 changed mean pfs_months by 1.6557 months (p=<1e-300).
Within feature_001=1, feature_043=1 versus 0 changed mean pfs_months by 0.0269 months (p=0.4557).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The favorable association of `feature_043` with `pfs_months` is reduced among patients with `feature_066` equal to 1.

analyses.result_summary: The feature_043:feature_066 interaction coefficient was -1.1829 months (p=<1e-300).
Within feature_066=0, feature_043=1 versus 0 changed mean pfs_months by 1.0274 months (p=<1e-300).
Within feature_066=1, feature_043=1 versus 0 changed mean pfs_months by -0.1556 months (p=0.1332).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The favorable association of `feature_043` with `pfs_months` is amplified among patients with `feature_042` equal to 1.

analyses.result_summary: The feature_043:feature_042 interaction coefficient was 0.9880 months (p=1.198e-11).
Within feature_042=0, feature_043=1 versus 0 changed mean pfs_months by 0.9413 months (p=<1e-300).
Within feature_042=1, feature_043=1 versus 0 changed mean pfs_months by 1.9293 months (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative slope between `feature_029` and `pfs_months` is steeper among patients with `feature_043` equal to 1 than among patients with `feature_043` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: The feature_029:feature_043 interaction coefficient was -0.0253 months per feature_029 unit (p=<1e-300).
Within feature_043=0, the feature_029 slope was -4.718e-4 months per unit (p=0.4619).
Within feature_043=1, the feature_029 slope was -0.0257 months per unit (p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative slope between `feature_029` and `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with `feature_001` equal to 1 than among patients with `feature_001` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: The feature_001:feature_029 interaction coefficient was 0.0073 months per feature_029 unit (p=9.697e-9).
Within feature_001=0, the feature_029 slope was -0.0084 months per unit (p=<1e-300).
Within feature_001=1, the feature_029 slope was -0.0010 months per unit (p=0.2560).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_028` values are weakly associated with lower `pfs_months`, but this association does not survive false-discovery control.

analyses.result_summary: Univariate OLS estimated -3.169e-4 months per one-unit increase in feature_028 (p=0.0126, BH q=0.0705).
Patients in the top quartile of feature_028 (>=267.3000) had -0.0581 months different mean pfs_months than the rest of the cohort (p=0.0136).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_034` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_034` equal to 0.
Patients with `feature_023` equal to 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_023` equal to 0.
Patients with `feature_057` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_057` equal to 0.

analyses.result_summary: feature_034=1 versus 0 changed mean pfs_months by -0.0191 months (p=0.3544), so this low-ranked candidate was not statistically supported.
feature_023=1 versus 0 changed mean pfs_months by 0.0399 months (p=0.7860), so this low-ranked candidate was not statistically supported.
feature_057=1 versus 0 changed mean pfs_months by -0.0556 months (p=0.3602), so this low-ranked candidate was not statistically supported.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A univariate screen of all `feature_*` columns identifies multiple predictors of `pfs_months` after Benjamini-Hochberg false-discovery control at q<0.05.

analyses.result_summary: 12 of 73 feature_* columns had BH q<0.05. The strongest was feature_041 with effect 0.1765 months per unit (p=<1e-300).
